posts.author: alexj94 (Abhinand)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, We are looking for automation duplications for the below scenario.

We have created a set of template boards under a folder. A numerous number of cross board automations are set with these template boards. However, we will need to take duplicates for these template boards whenever a new folder is created. For us, the folder represents the Project and the boards under each folder represents the workstream. So whenever we create a new project, all of the workstreams should be duplicated. But while duplicating so, do we have the option to duplicate the cross board automations as well?

Thank you
